title: Eternal Fear
body:
## Eternal Fear
The Eternal Fear modpack aims to make you feel like you are beeing watched. It aims to make you paranoid and feel like there is something in the shadows even when nothing is there. Thanks to countless hours of research, I have been able to improve the performance so everyone can enjoy the modpack.

EF was made with multiplayer and visuals in mind.This means that there are two shaders preinstalled which improve the atmosphere, also one ressource pack is included - you can add more if you feel like it. Essential is also installed so you can play with your friends.

With Create and the other mods installed you can build anything you could think of. This also means your creativity is the limit, and the source of your builds.

## Features
🕸️ Biomes - Explore Spooky Biomes

🍖 Food - Enjoy the different kind of food added by Farmer's Delight

🕷️ Bosses - New scary mobs

📦 Chests - Store lots of items using "iron chests"

🪑 Furniture - decorate with "MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod"

Ressoure Pack:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true
